# Pull Request

Closes #

## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Scope

## Out of scope

What is intentionally not included?

## Testing

List commands and manual checks:

- [ ] TypeScript check
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Manual game flow checked where relevant

## Game checks

- [ ] Game rules remain outside UI components
- [ ] Generated output is validated before use
- [ ] Private role data is protected
- [ ] Invalid actions are rejected

## Docs

- [ ] README updated if setup changed
- [ ] Relevant docs updated if API, database, prompts, or rules changed

Add anything important for review.
